ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "time" REAL /* Timestamp for the recorded data */,
  "y_sum" INTEGER /* Sum of certain operational metrics */,
  "y_product" INTEGER /* Product count monitored by the sensor */,
  "y_triggeredAdd" INTEGER /* Count of triggered add events */,
  "y_multiSwitch" INTEGER /* Count of multi-switch activations */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected this data */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the sensor is located */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific machine or equipment associated with the sensor */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event that may have been triggered by this data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., sensor, IoT device) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, bad, questionable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure, proximity) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor in the facility */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the sensor is installed */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific machine or equipment associated with the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that generated the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the alert */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the alert occurred */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is assigned to handle the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of the resolution actions taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Account creation timestamp */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role (comma-separated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry being logged */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message or description of the log entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the data entry was logged */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific machine or equipment associated with the data entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., data, error, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., conveyor, boiler, mixer) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the equipment in the facility */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the equipment is installed */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "parts_used" TEXT /* List of parts used during the maintenance */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert associated with the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the notification (e.g., sent, acknowledged) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read by the user */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event triggered (e.g., sensor alert, maintenance required) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event occurrence */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that triggered the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the event occurred */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific machine or equipment associated with the event */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the production process (e.g., minor, significant, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)
